details: Apple officially set WWDC 2026 for June 8-12. Keynote at 10 AM PT. Features iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27 with major Siri overhauls. Tim Cook visited Beijing for trade negotiations.
NVIDIA GTC AI conference in Taipei (June 1-4) during COMPUTEX. Focus on physical and agentic AI. U.S. approved H200 sales to major Chinese firms (Alibaba, ByteDance). Jensen Huang visited Beijing.

product: Ascend 950PR AI Chip / Global AIDC Industry Summit
details: Huawei successfully produced Ascend 950PR with better CUDA compatibility. Launched grid-interactive AIDC strategy in Dongguan. Huawei ICT Competition final in Shenzhen (June 2-5).

product: Huawei Ascend 950PR Orders / AI Infrastructure Investment
details: ByteDance planning to order Huawei's Ascend 950PR chips to bypass supply restrictions. Announced $30 billion investment into AI infrastructure and computing systems.
Alibaba planning to utilize Huawei 950PR chips alongside newly licensed NVIDIA H200 chips. Expanding cloud data centers across Asia for localized generative AI.
OPPO Pad 6 (Dimensity 9500s) launches May 25. Reno16 Pro specs leak (200MP gimbal cam).
World's first Robot Phone showcased. WIN Turbo and 600 series (8000mAh battery) launching May 29.
